MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2022 -- APPEARANCES BY JEFFREY CHEN, ESQ. FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT KWOK PUN LEUNG DBA W&K CONSTRUCTION; ANDREW KLIMENKO, ESQ. FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT YOW WEN LIU; KENNETH R. VAN VLECK, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT RU HAI LING -- ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-15-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303, JUDGE SUZANNE RAMOS BOLANOS. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 303 BY E-MAIL BY 4:00 PM ON 8/19/22 AND THE CLERK'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. THE COURT ALSO ASSIGNED CASE TO A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT THE COURT'S ADR COORDINATOR, ELIZABETH KELBER, BY EMAIL BY 4:00 PM ON 8/17/22 FOR SCHEDULING OF THE MSC. THE ADR COORDINATOR'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, PAYABLE BY AUG-25-2022, IS IMPOSED ON ATTY. JEFFREY CHEN FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON AUG-26-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. ADONG NI, COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER PRESENT IN COURT. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 7-15 DAYS. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
